entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_validate_rejects_invalid_0')
config_payload = {'version': '1'}, expected_error_parts = ('schema', 'required')

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "expected_error_parts"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1"},
                ("schema", "required"),
                id="schema-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "unknown_schema"},
                ("schema", "unknown_schema"),
                id="schema-unrecognized",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": 1},
                ("schema", "string"),
                id="schema-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": "linux"},
                ("os", "object"),
                id="os-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {}},
                ("os.name", "required"),
                id="os-name-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {"name": "windows"}},
                ("os.name", "macos", "linux"),
                id="os-name-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "package_manager": "pacman"},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "brew", "apt", "yum"),
                id="package-manager-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": "curl",
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages", "list"),
                id="packages-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "string"),
                id="packages-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="packages-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": "firefox",
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications", "list"),
                id="applications-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "string"),
                id="applications-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="applications-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "applications": ["firefox"]},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "required", "applications"),
                id="package-manager-required-with-apps",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": "copy"},
                ("actions", "list"),
                id="actions-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [1]},
                ("actions[0]", "object"),
                id="action-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "required"),
                id="action-type-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": 1, "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "string"),
                id="action-type-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "move", "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "move"),
                id="action-type-unknown",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [{"type": "run"}]},
                ("actions[0].source", "required"),
                id="action-source-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "string"),
                id="action-source-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": ""}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "non-empty"),
                id="action-source-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": "/etc/passwd"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "module-relative"),
                id="action-source-relative",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "link", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-link",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-copy",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a", "destination": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1

                    "actions": [{"type": "link", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-link",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-copy",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a", "destination": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

                        "packages": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="packages-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": "firefox",
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications", "list"),
                id="applications-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "string"),
                id="applications-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="applications-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "applications": ["firefox"]},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "required", "applications"),
                id="package-manager-required-with-apps",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": "copy"},
                ("actions", "list"),
                id="actions-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [1]},
                ("actions[0]", "object"),
                id="action-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "required"),
                id="action-type-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": 1, "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "string"),
                id="action-type-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "move", "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "move"),
                id="action-type-unknown",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [{"type": "run"}]},
                ("actions[0].source", "required"),
                id="action-source-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "string"),
                id="action-source-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": ""}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "non-empty"),
                id="action-source-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": "/etc/passwd"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "module-relative"),
                id="action-source-relative",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "link", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-link",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-copy",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a", "destination": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_validate_rejects_invalid_23')
config_payload = {'actions': [{'source': 'a', 'type': 'link'}], 'schema': 'module', 'version': '1'}
expected_error_parts = ('actions[0].destination', 'required')

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "expected_error_parts"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1"},
                ("schema", "required"),
                id="schema-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "unknown_schema"},
                ("schema", "unknown_schema"),
                id="schema-unrecognized",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": 1},
                ("schema", "string"),
                id="schema-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": "linux"},
                ("os", "object"),
                id="os-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {}},
                ("os.name", "required"),
                id="os-name-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {"name": "windows"}},
                ("os.name", "macos", "linux"),
                id="os-name-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "package_manager": "pacman"},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "brew", "apt", "yum"),
                id="package-manager-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": "curl",
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages", "list"),
                id="packages-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "string"),
                id="packages-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="packages-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": "firefox",
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications", "list"),
                id="applications-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "string"),
                id="applications-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="applications-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "applications": ["firefox"]},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "required", "applications"),
                id="package-manager-required-with-apps",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": "copy"},
                ("actions", "list"),
                id="actions-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [1]},
                ("actions[0]", "object"),
                id="action-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "required"),
                id="action-type-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": 1, "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "string"),
                id="action-type-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "move", "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "move"),
                id="action-type-unknown",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [{"type": "run"}]},
                ("actions[0].source", "required"),
                id="action-source-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "string"),
                id="action-source-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": ""}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "non-empty"),
                id="action-source-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": "/etc/passwd"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "module-relative"),
                id="action-source-relative",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "link", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-link",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-copy",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a", "destination": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)
>       errors = get_file_errors(payload, "git/config.yaml")
                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    def get_file_errors(
        payload: dict[str, Any],
        relative_path: str,
    ) -> list[str]:
        """Extract validation errors for a file entry in validate output."""

idx = 0

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

idx = 0

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.

        have extraneous data at the end.

idx = 0

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:
>           raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_conflict_not_affected_by_os_version(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Conflict detection for link/copy is not affected by --os-version filtering."""
        home_dir = tmp_path / "home"
        home_dir.mkdir()
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "alpha",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a.txt",
                            "destination": "~/.shared",
                        },
                    ]
                ),
                "preferences.yaml": preferences_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "name": "pref-a",
                            "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                            "key": "pref_a",
                            "value": True,
                            "value_type": "bool",
                            "apply_command": (
                                "defaults write com.apple.dock pref_a -bool true"
                            ),
                            "min_version": "ventura",
                        },
                    ]
                ),
            },
            files={"a.txt": "a"},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "beta",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "link",
                            "source": "b.txt",
                            "destination": "~/.shared",
                        },
                    ]
                ),
                "preferences.yaml": preferences_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "name": "pref-b",
                            "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                            "key": "pref_b",
                            "value": False,
                            "value_type": "bool",
                            "apply_command": (
                                "defaults write com.apple.dock pref_b -bool false"
                            ),
                            "min_version": "ventura",
                        },
                    ]
                ),
            },
            files={"b.txt": "b"},
        )

            entrypoint_argv,
            tmp_path,
            "--os-version",
            "sierra",
            home_dir=home_dir,

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python

    @pytest.mark.error

            tmp_path,
            "a",

                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a.txt",
                            "destination": "/tmp/shared.txt",
                        }
                    ]
                )
            },
            files={"a.txt": "a"},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "link",
                            "source": "b.txt",
                            "destination": "/tmp/shared.txt",
                        }
                    ]
                )
            },
            files={"b.txt": "b"},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "app",

                    actions=[{"type": "run", "source": "setup.sh"}],
                    depends_on=["core"],
                )
            },
            files={"setup.sh": "echo app"},
        )

                            "type": "copy",

                        }
                    ],
                    depends_on=["b"],
                )
            },

            tmp_path,
            "b",

                "module.yaml": module_schema(

                        {
                            "type": "link",
                            "source": "b.txt",
                            "destination": "/tmp/shared.txt",
                        }

                    depends_on=["c"],
                )

            tmp_path,

    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_plan_errors_on_circular_dependency(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Fails with a circular dependency cycle when modules form a dependency loop."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "a",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["b"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["c"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1

idx = 0

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

        fragment: str,

        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""

                            "versions": ["3.11.2"],

                                "name": "pyenv",

                                        ],
                                    }
                                ],
                            },
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "virtual_environments[0].name",
                id="virtual-env-name-empty",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""

config_payload = {'environments': [{'language': 'python', 'manager': {'name': 'pyenv', 'plugins': [{'name': 'pyenv-virtualenv', 'virtual_environments': [...]}]}, 'versions': ['3.11.2']}], 'schema': 'environments', 'version': '1'}
fragment = 'virtual_environments[0].name'

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "fragment"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": "python",
                },
                "environments",
                id="environments-not-list",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": [],
                },
                "environments",
                id="environments-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": ["python"],
                },
                "environments[0]",
                id="environment-item-not-object",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [{"versions": ["3.11.2"], "manager": {"name": "pyenv"}}]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="missing-language",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": 1,
                            "versions": ["3.11.2"],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="language-not-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "",
                            "versions": ["3.11.2"],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="language-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [{"language": "python", "manager": {"name": "pyenv"}}]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions",
                id="missing-versions",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": "3.11.2",
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions",
                id="versions-not-list",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": [],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions",
                id="versions-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": [1],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions[0]",
                id="version-not-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": [""],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions[0]",
                id="version-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [{"language": "python", "versions": ["3.11.2"]}]
                ),
                "environments[0].manager",
                id="missing-manager",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [

                            "language": "python",

            pytest.param(

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def test_plan_file_not_found_before_circular_dep(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Prioritizes file_not_found before checking circular dependencies."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "a",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "missing.txt",
                            "destination": "/tmp/missing.txt",
                        }
                    ],
                    depends_on=["b"],
                )
            },
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["c"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "c",

        )

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_diamond_dependency_o0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_diamond_dependency_ordering(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Orders modules correctly in a diamond dependency graph."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "a",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "d",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["b", "c"])
            },
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_circular_inheritance_error(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        run_cmd: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Plan and list-profiles detect circular inheritance and emit cycle errors."""
        write_yaml(

            manifest_schema(

                    "c": {"extends": "a", "modules": ["core"]},
                }
            ),
        )

            tmp_path,
            "core",

        )
    
        if run_cmd == "plan":
            result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, "--profile", "a")
        else:
            result = run_list_profiles(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1

    @pytest.mark.error
    def test_validate_rejects_nested_manifest(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Validate rejects manifest files located inside module directories."""
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "git" / "manifest.yaml",

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_profile_os_module_three_way(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Plan applies --profile, --module intersection, and --os filter together."""
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "manifest.yaml",
            manifest_schema({"all": {"modules": ["core", "shell", "dev"]}}),
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "core",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "shell",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(os_name="linux", actions=[])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "dev",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
    
        result = run_plan(
            entrypoint_argv,
            tmp_path,
            "--profile",
            "all",
            "--module",
            "core",
            "--module",
            "shell",
            "--os",
            "macos",
        )
